data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Refund if never gets spot', but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. While the linked use case states that the $5 waitlist fee is refunded if a customer never receives a slot, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the actual refund process or any related transactions. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm that the refund mechanism is implemented and functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence of the refund process for customers who do not receive a spot from the waitlist.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
